---
title: "\"Hallucinate\": Cambridge Dictionary's 2023 Word of the Year"
description: "Cambridge Dictionary's 2023 word of the year: \"hallucinate.\""
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-11-17"
categories: [generative AI, LLMs, NLP, hallucination, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Cambridge Dictionary 2023 word of the year. Image from [Ars Technica](https://arstechnica.com/information-technology/2023/11/thanks-to-ai-hallucinate-is-cambridge-dictionarys-word-of-the-year-for-2023/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Cambridge Dictionary announced that its 2023 word of the year is "hallucinate."


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_hallucinating-ai-models-help-coin-cambridge-activity-7131403185809723394-F18b).*
